name: Choking Talons
description:
Call forth talons from the ground, dealing 1742 Flame Damage to enemies near you and immobilizing them for 4 seconds. 

Enemies hit are afflicted with Minor Maim, reducing damage done by 5% for 20 seconds. 

An ally near the talons can activate the Ignite synergy, dealing 2812 Flame Damage to all enemies held within them.
